indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pages_pkey ON public.pages USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_slug ON public.pages USING btree (slug)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_page_type ON public.pages USING btree (page_type)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_page_target_id ON public.pages USING btree (page_target_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_quality_status ON public.pages USING btree (quality_status)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_worker_queue ON public.pages USING btree (status, site, page_type, created_at) WHERE (status = 'pending'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_city_slug ON public.pages USING btree (site, city, slug)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_failed_retry ON public.pages USING btree (status, updated_at) WHERE (status = 'failed'::text)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_symptom_id ON public.pages USING btree (symptom_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_cause_id ON public.pages USING btree (cause_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_repair_id ON public.pages USING btree (repair_id)
CREATE INDEX idx_pages_published_at ON public.pages USING btree (published_at DESC)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX pages_canonical_unique ON public.pages USING btree (site, page_type, slug, COALESCE(city, ''::text))
